data.name: error.auth.invalid_credentials
data.value: Authentication failed: invalid username or password.

data.name: error.auth.login_success
data.value: Login succeeded.

data.name: error.auth.legacy_login_deprecated
data.value: The legacy login endpoint is deprecated. Please use the OIDC login flow.

data.name: error.auth.unauthorized
data.value: Sign in to continue.

data.name: error.bootstrap.display_name_required
data.value: Enter a display name.

data.name: error.bootstrap.display_name_length_invalid
data.value: The display name must contain {0}-{1} characters.

data.name: error.bootstrap.display_name_characters_invalid
data.value: The display name can contain only Chinese characters, English letters, and numbers.

data.name: error.bootstrap.email_invalid
data.value: Enter a valid email address.

data.name: error.bootstrap.password_required
data.value: Enter a password.

data.name: error.bootstrap.password_confirmation_mismatch
data.value: The passwords do not match.

data.name: error.bootstrap.password_length_invalid
data.value: The password must contain at least {0} characters.

data.name: error.bootstrap.password_complexity_invalid
data.value: The password must include an uppercase letter, a lowercase letter, a number, and a special character.

data.name: error.bootstrap.password_contains_display_name
data.value: The password cannot contain the display name.

data.name: error.bootstrap.password_contains_email_local_part
data.value: The password cannot contain the part of the email address before @.

data.name: error.bootstrap.password_weak
data.value: Default and commonly used weak passwords are not allowed.

data.name: error.bootstrap.already_initialized
data.value: An administrator already exists, so initialization is closed.

data.name: error.bootstrap.email_taken
data.value: This email address is already registered.

data.name: error.bootstrap.concurrent_initialization
data.value: Administrator initialization is already in progress. Refresh and try again.

data.name: error.bootstrap.initialization_failed
data.value: Administrator initialization failed. Try again later.

data.name: error.forum.publish_title_required
data.value: Enter a post title.

data.name: error.forum.publish_title_too_short
data.value: The post title is too short. Add more detail before publishing.

data.name: error.forum.publish_title_too_long
data.value: The post title is too long. Shorten it before publishing.

data.name: error.forum.publish_content_required
data.value: Enter post content.

data.name: error.forum.publish_content_too_short
data.value: The post content is too short. Add more detail before publishing.

data.name: error.forum.publish_content_too_long
data.value: The post content is too long. Shorten it before publishing.

data.name: error.forum.publish_category_required
data.value: Select a post category before publishing.

data.name: error.forum.publish_content_type_invalid
data.value: The post content type is invalid.

data.name: error.forum.publish_tag_count_invalid
data.value: Select between one and five tags before publishing.

data.name: error.forum.publish_feature_combination_invalid
data.value: Question, poll, and lottery features cannot be enabled together.

data.name: error.forum.publish_poll_question_required
data.value: Enter a poll question.

data.name: error.forum.publish_poll_question_too_long
data.value: The poll question cannot exceed 200 characters.

data.name: error.forum.publish_poll_end_time_invalid
data.value: The poll end time must be in the future.

data.name: error.forum.publish_poll_options_required
data.value: Enter poll options.

data.name: error.forum.publish_poll_option_count_invalid
data.value: A poll must contain between two and six options.

data.name: error.forum.publish_poll_options_duplicate
data.value: Poll options must be unique.

data.name: error.forum.publish_poll_option_too_long
data.value: Each poll option cannot exceed 100 characters.

data.name: error.forum.publish_lottery_prize_name_required
data.value: Enter a lottery prize name.

data.name: error.forum.publish_lottery_prize_name_too_long
data.value: The prize name cannot exceed 100 characters.

data.name: error.forum.publish_lottery_prize_description_too_long
data.value: The prize description cannot exceed 500 characters.

data.name: error.forum.publish_lottery_draw_time_required
data.value: Select a lottery draw time.

data.name: error.forum.publish_lottery_draw_time_too_soon
data.value: The lottery draw time must be at least one hour after publication.

data.name: error.forum.publish_lottery_winner_count_invalid
data.value: The winner count must be between 1 and 20.

data.name: error.forum.publish_forbidden
data.value: Your current account status does not allow publishing.

data.name: error.forum.publish_tag_create_forbidden
data.value: A selected tag does not exist, and your account cannot create new tags.

data.name: error.forum.publish_submission_id_invalid
data.value: The submission identifier is invalid. Refresh and submit again.

data.name: error.forum.publish_submission_conflict
data.value: This submission conflicts with an existing request. Refresh and submit again.

data.name: error.forum.publish_submission_processing
data.value: Your content is still being submitted. Check the result shortly.

data.name: error.forum.publish_rate_limited
data.value: You are submitting too frequently. Try again in {0} seconds.

data.name: error.attachment.file_empty
data.value: Select a non-empty file to upload.

data.name: error.attachment.not_found
data.value: The attachment does not exist or is no longer available.

data.name: error.attachment.image_type_unsupported
data.value: This image format is not supported.

data.name: error.attachment.document_type_unsupported
data.value: This document format is not supported.

data.name: error.attachment.business_type_unsupported
data.value: This attachment business type is not supported.

data.name: error.attachment.upload_forbidden
data.value: Your account does not have permission to upload this file.

data.name: error.attachment.rate_limited
data.value: You are uploading too frequently. Try again later.

data.name: error.attachment.concurrent_upload_limit_reached
data.value: You currently have {0} uploads in progress, which reaches the concurrent upload limit of {1}.

data.name: error.attachment.upload_frequency_limit_reached
data.value: You started {0} uploads this minute, which reaches the limit of {1} upload attempts per minute. Try again later.

data.name: error.attachment.daily_upload_size_limit_reached
data.value: Your completed and reserved uploads use {0} today, leaving {1}; this {2} file cannot be uploaded.

data.name: error.attachment.file_too_large
data.value: The selected file exceeds the upload size limit of {0}.

data.name: error.attachment.unsupported_media_type
data.value: This file type is not supported.

data.name: error.attachment.content_mismatch
data.value: The file content does not match its extension.

data.name: error.attachment.storage_failed
data.value: The file could not be stored. Try again later.

data.name: error.attachment.processing_failed
data.value: The file could not be processed. Try again later.

data.name: error.attachment.chunked_upload_disabled
data.value: Chunked uploads are currently disabled.

data.name: error.attachment.upload_session_invalid
data.value: The upload session request is invalid. Check the file and chunk parameters.

data.name: error.attachment.upload_session_not_found
data.value: The upload session does not exist or your account cannot access it.

data.name: error.attachment.upload_session_expired
data.value: The upload session expired. Start the upload again.

data.name: error.attachment.upload_session_state_conflict
data.value: The upload session state does not allow this operation.

data.name: error.attachment.upload_chunk_invalid
data.value: The upload chunk index or data length is invalid.

data.name: error.attachment.upload_chunks_incomplete
data.value: Some chunks are still missing, so the upload cannot be merged yet.

data.name: error.common.internal_error
data.value: Internal server error. Please try again later.

data.name: info.user.get_by_id_success
data.value: User fetched successfully.

data.name: error.user.not_found
data.value: User not found.

data.name: error.experience.other_user_forbidden
data.value: You cannot view another user’s private experience details.

data.name: error.experience.not_found
data.value: Experience data was not found for this account.

data.name: error.order.not_found
data.value: The order was not found.

data.name: error.order.retry_rejected
data.value: This order cannot be fulfilled again. Refresh and verify its state and payment evidence.

data.name: error.order.remark_failed
data.value: The order note could not be saved. Refresh and try again.

data.name: error.shop.benefit_operation_rejected
data.value: The benefit operation could not be completed. Refresh and verify the current benefit state.

data.name: error.product.not_found
data.value: The product was not found.

data.name: error.product.configuration_invalid
data.value: The product configuration is invalid. Review the capability requirements and try again.

data.name: error.product.sale_unsupported
data.value: This product type is not open and cannot be put on sale.

data.name: error.product.version_conflict
data.value: Another administrator changed this product. Refresh and try again.

data.name: error.product.delete_order_conflict
data.value: This product has order records and cannot be deleted. Take it off sale to preserve historical order snapshots.

data.name: error.product.operation_rejected
data.value: The product operation could not be completed. Refresh and try again.

data.name: error.moderation.validation_failed
data.value: The moderation request is invalid. Check the submitted values and try again.

data.name: error.moderation.target_user_not_found
data.value: The target user was not found.

data.name: error.moderation.report_already_pending
data.value: A pending report already exists for this content.

data.name: error.moderation.report_not_found
data.value: The report was not found.

data.name: error.moderation.report_already_reviewed
data.value: The report has already been reviewed. Refresh the review queue.

data.name: error.moderation.target_action_unsupported
data.value: This target does not support a linked user-moderation action.

data.name: error.moderation.concurrent_review_conflict
data.value: The report was processed by another request. Refresh the review queue.

data.name: error.wiki.validation_failed
data.value: The document request is invalid. Check the submitted values and try again.

data.name: error.wiki.document_not_found
data.value: The document was not found.

data.name: error.wiki.document_not_accessible
data.value: The document was not found or the current account cannot access it.

data.name: error.wiki.restore_rejected
data.value: The document was not found or cannot be restored from its current state.

data.name: error.wiki.revision_not_found
data.value: The document revision was not found.

data.name: error.wiki.rollback_rejected
data.value: The revision was not found or the document has been deleted, so it cannot be rolled back.

data.name: error.wiki.built_in_read_only
data.value: Built-in documents are read only. Update their source file in Docs instead.

data.name: error.wiki.child_document_conflict
data.value: Handle child documents before deleting this document.

data.name: error.wiki.revision_already_current
data.value: This document already matches the selected revision and does not need to be rolled back.

data.name: error.wiki.markdown_file_empty
data.value: The Markdown file cannot be empty.

data.name: error.wiki.markdown_file_unsupported
data.value: Only Markdown text files can be imported.

data.name: error.wiki.markdown_content_empty
data.value: The imported Markdown content cannot be empty.

data.name: error.wiki.access_policy_required
data.value: A restricted document requires at least one role or permission.

data.name: error.wiki.parent_cannot_be_self
data.value: A document cannot be its own parent.

data.name: error.wiki.parent_not_found
data.value: The parent document was not found.

data.name: error.wiki.parent_cycle_conflict
data.value: A descendant of this document cannot be selected as its parent.

data.name: error.user_follow.invalid_target_user
data.value: The target user is invalid.

data.name: error.user_follow.self_follow_rejected
data.value: You cannot follow yourself.

data.name: error.user_follow.self_unfollow_rejected
data.value: You cannot unfollow yourself.

data.name: error.user_follow.target_unavailable
data.value: The target user does not exist or is unavailable.

data.name: error.user_follow.follow_rejected
data.value: The follow action could not be completed.

data.name: error.user_follow.invalid_stream_type
data.value: This content stream type is not supported.

data.name: error.pet.invalid_request
data.value: Check the pet profile or care details and try again.

data.name: error.pet.invalid_action
data.value: This care action is not supported.

data.name: error.pet.not_claimed
data.value: Claim your pet first.

data.name: error.pet.daily_limit_reached
data.value: This care action has reached its daily limit.

data.name: error.pet.care_cooldown
data.value: This care action is still cooling down.

data.name: error.coin.transaction_not_found
data.value: The transaction was not found.

data.name: error.coin.transfer_self_rejected
data.value: You cannot transfer carrots to yourself.

data.name: error.coin.transfer_amount_invalid
data.value: The transfer amount must be greater than zero.

data.name: error.coin.transfer_insufficient_balance
data.value: Your available carrot balance is insufficient.

data.name: error.coin.transfer_account_unavailable
data.value: The current asset account state does not allow this transfer.

data.name: error.coin.transfer_concurrency_conflict
data.value: The asset state changed. Refresh and try again.

data.name: error.coin.transfer_processing
data.value: This transfer is still processing. Check its result shortly.

data.name: error.coin.transfer_idempotency_conflict
data.value: This request identifier was already used for different transfer details.

data.name: error.coin.transfer_idempotency_invalid
data.value: The transfer request identifier is invalid.

data.name: error.coin.transfer_replay_unavailable
data.value: The previous transfer result is temporarily unavailable. Try again shortly.

data.name: error.payment_password.required
data.value: Enter your payment passcode.

data.name: error.payment_password.format_invalid
data.value: The payment passcode must contain exactly six digits.

data.name: error.payment_password.repeated_digits
data.value: The payment passcode cannot use the same digit six times.

data.name: error.payment_password.confirmation_mismatch
data.value: The payment passcodes do not match.

data.name: error.payment_password.already_configured
data.value: A payment passcode is already configured. Use the change action instead.

data.name: error.payment_password.not_configured
data.value: No payment passcode has been configured.

data.name: error.payment_password.invalid
data.value: The payment passcode is incorrect. Try again.

data.name: error.payment_password.locked
data.value: The payment passcode is temporarily locked. Try again later.

data.name: error.payment_password.upgrade_required
data.value: The legacy payment passcode is disabled. Reset a new six-digit passcode in Security settings.

data.name: error.common.validation_failed
data.value: Check the submitted information and try again.

data.name: error.common.not_found
data.value: The requested resource was not found.

data.name: error.common.conflict
data.value: The resource has changed. Refresh and try again.

data.name: error.sticker.batch_code_conflict
data.value: One or more sticker codes already exist. Update the conflicting rows and try again.

data.name: error.sticker.image_processing_failed
data.value: One or more sticker images could not be processed. Try again later.

data.name: error.sticker.group_not_found
data.value: The sticker group does not exist or is no longer available.

data.name: error.coin.balance_query_rejected
data.value: The user balance could not be loaded. Verify the account and try again.

data.name: error.coin.admin_adjust_rejected
data.value: The balance adjustment could not be completed. Verify the balance and submitted details.

data.name: error.experience.admin_adjust_rejected
data.value: The experience adjustment could not be completed. Verify the account and submitted details.

data.name: error.experience.freeze_until_invalid
data.value: The freeze expiration must be later than the current time.

data.name: error.experience.freeze_rejected
data.value: The experience freeze could not be completed. Verify the account state and try again.

data.name: error.experience.unfreeze_rejected
data.value: The experience freeze could not be removed. Verify the account state and try again.

data.name: error.experience.review_rejected
data.value: The governance review result could not be recorded. Verify the submitted details.

data.name: error.chat.channel_unavailable
data.value: The conversation does not exist or this account cannot access it.

data.name: error.chat.send_forbidden
data.value: This account cannot send messages in the conversation.

data.name: error.chat.message_idempotency_conflict
data.value: This message request identifier was already used for different content. Refresh the conversation and try again.

data.name: error.chat.attachment_unavailable
data.value: The chat attachment is unavailable, not permitted, or already bound to another message.

data.name: error.chat.attachment_binding_conflict
data.value: The chat attachment binding has changed. Refresh the conversation and try again.

data.name: error.chat.channel_list_view_invalid
data.value: The conversation list view must be active or archived.

data.name: error.chat.direct_target_invalid
data.value: The target user identifier is invalid.

data.name: error.chat.direct_self_not_allowed
data.value: You cannot start a direct conversation with yourself.

data.name: error.chat.direct_target_unavailable
data.value: The target user does not exist or is unavailable.

data.name: error.chat.direct_peer_unavailable
data.value: The other account is unavailable, so this conversation cannot continue.

data.name: error.chat.direct_receiver_required
data.value: Only the recipient of the direct-message request can perform this action.

data.name: error.chat.direct_action_conflict
data.value: The current direct-message request state does not allow this action.

data.name: error.chat.direct_blocked_by_peer
data.value: The conversation was blocked by the other participant.

data.name: error.chat.direct_unblock_forbidden
data.value: Only the participant who blocked the conversation can unblock it.

data.name: error.chat.direct_blocked
data.value: The conversation is blocked.

data.name: error.chat.direct_not_accepted
data.value: Accept the direct-message request before sending messages.

data.name: error.chat.direct_request_already_sent
data.value: The first message for this direct-message request has already been sent.

data.name: error.chat.direct_request_text_only
data.value: A direct-message request allows one plain text message without images, replies, or mentions.

data.name: error.chat.direct_request_declined
data.value: The direct-message request was declined and cannot receive more messages.

data.name: error.chat.message_type_unavailable
data.value: This endpoint only accepts text or image messages.

data.name: error.chat.reply_unavailable
data.value: The replied-to message does not exist or belongs to another conversation.

data.name: error.chat.search_keyword_invalid
data.value: The normalized search keyword must contain 2 to 100 characters.

data.name: error.chat.search_scope_invalid
data.value: The search scope and conversation parameters are invalid.

data.name: error.chat.search_page_size_invalid
data.value: The search page size must be between 1 and 50.

data.name: error.chat.search_time_range_invalid
data.value: The search start time must be earlier than the end time.

data.name: error.chat.search_cursor_invalid
data.value: The search conditions, account, or conversation access changed. Run the search again.

data.name: error.chat.reaction_invalid_argument
data.value: The message reaction request is invalid.

data.name: error.chat.reaction_not_allowed
data.value: The current conversation state does not allow message reactions.

data.name: error.chat.reaction_target_unavailable
data.value: The message is missing, recalled, or unavailable to this account.

data.name: error.chat.reaction_idempotency_conflict
data.value: This reaction operation ID was already used for another action. Refresh and try again.

data.name: error.chat.reaction_concurrent_conflict
data.value: The reaction state changed concurrently. Refresh and try again.

data.name: error.chat.reaction_limit_exceeded
data.value: You can keep at most 10 reaction types on one message.

data.name: error.chat.reaction_sticker_unavailable
data.value: The selected sticker is missing, disabled, or unavailable to this tenant.

data.name: error.chat.pin_invalid_argument
data.value: The message pin request is invalid.

data.name: error.chat.pin_not_allowed
data.value: This account cannot manage message pins in the current conversation.

data.name: error.chat.pin_target_unavailable
data.value: The message is missing, recalled, or unavailable to this account.

data.name: error.chat.pin_concurrent_conflict
data.value: The message pin state changed concurrently. Refresh and try again.

data.name: error.chat.pin_limit_exceeded
data.value: Each conversation can keep at most 20 pinned messages.
